subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants, near unto the threshold of the All-Glorious! The letter which ye had written to Jináb-i-Manshádí hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا نامه ای که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
